calendar.matters:
Petition For Declaratory Relief As To The
Off Calendar Jun-26-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 287413 and 287719. Nancy Rasch appearing for Reina Hugh, conservator/successor trustee. Nancy Lewellen appearing for Alex Peng Hugh. Lillian Ng appearing as court appointed counsel for the conservatee. Michael Spalding appearing as litigation counsel. Ms. Lewellen informs the court that Alex Hugh has filed for bankruptcy and everything is automatic stayed. Dr. Burg's report is not ready. Other counsel are concern about the conservatee's age and want to go forward as soon as possible. Court will continue all matters except Mr. Spalding's petition to 7/24. No further continuance on 7/24 without showing of extreme good cause. Mr. Spalding has no objection to continue his petition to 7/24. All matters are continued to 7/24 to see what is stayed and what is not stayed. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
